meaning: adj.不能接近的,不可亲的,无可匹敌的
examples: I can safely say that on the days when I lose a lot of sleep, I am a very grumpy and unapproachable individual.
The judge was a stern, unapproachable man.
The body guards would have made him unapproachable.
There are times of the year when the stench from rotting vegetation makes the coastline unapproachable.
He's unapproachable as a songwriter and an artist, and his influences are always going to be of interest to me.
